terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.subtitle: Oryxen Smart Plant Care — Terms of Service & Privacy Summary
terms.intro: By accessing or using the Oryxen ecosystem (landing page, web application, mobile application and IoT devices), you agree to these Terms & Conditions. Please read them carefully.
terms.s1Body: Oryxen provides smart plant-care monitoring through sensors, a web and mobile application, and automated recommendations. You agree to use the service only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these terms.
terms.s2Body: You are responsible for safeguarding the credentials used to access your account and for any activity that occurs under it. Notify us immediately of any unauthorized use.
terms.s3Body: Paid plans (Basic and Premium) are billed on a recurring monthly basis. You may cancel at any time; access continues until the end of the current billing period.
terms.s4Body: We collect telemetry from your devices (temperature, humidity, soil moisture, light) and account information solely to deliver and improve the service. We do not sell your personal data. You may request deletion of your account and associated data at any time.
terms.s5Body: Oryxen is developed following the ACM/IEEE Software Engineering Code of Ethics. We are committed to transparency, accessibility and inclusive design across all products.
terms.s6Body: For questions about these terms, contact us at support@oryxen.io.
